name: codex-legacy-mcp-bridge
description: Bridge legacy SSE MCP servers into a stdio MCP server Codex can use.

interface.shortDescription: Install legacy SSE MCP servers as normal Codex MCPs.
interface.longDescription: Adds a generic local stdio bridge so Codex can use older SSE-based MCP servers that are not yet streamable HTTP.
defaultPrompt: Install a legacy SSE MCP server for Codex.
Bridge an old /sse/ MCP endpoint into stdio.
Set up X Research Tools through the legacy bridge.
